articles.author: Jan Cienski
articles.title: Poland scrambles to respond after Pentagon ditches troop deployment plan - politico.eu
articles.description: Warsaw insists that all is fine despite the unexpected American decision — but fears are growing.
articles.content:
Trump last week said  he "might" move U.S. troops to Poland. "I have a great relationship with the president," he said, "so that's possible."
However, Trump has also questioned the U.S. commitment t… [+1096 chars]
